“叮，恭喜宿主获得魅力*10。”
“叮，恭喜宿主获得体质*10。”
“叮，恭喜宿主获得智力*10。”
“叮，恭喜宿主获得神级记忆力和悟性，可一目千行，过目不忘，举一反百……”
林北猝死，却魂穿平行世界，还从高三开始，并绑定神级全能学霸系统。
从此学水不在，一代神级学霸诞生。
“既然上天给我重生的机会，那我将脱胎换骨，努力上进，活出灿烂，不负本心。”
林北：“咦，大家这是肿么了？”
“我才出三分力，怎么就全倒下了？”
“既然一个能打的都没有，那我只能研究曲率驱动，探索星辰大海了啊！”
众人：“……”
“收手吧阿北，求给条活路吧！”
“我以为我考满分就够强了，可见到北神才知道，原来我还很菜……”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/84b4fec0b849e036db8ac103e6ea0126~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"苍穹隐","author_id":"","book_id":"7076397329179216933","book_name":"重生学霸，不会真以为学习难吧？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":82,"name":"学霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=82&name=学霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":854,"name":"黑科技","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=854&name=黑科技&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7078638099714179591","read_count":"766","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"621907"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.2","serial_count":"256","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,重生,学霸,校花,黑科技","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/84b4fec0b849e036db8ac103e6ea0126~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779390477&x-signature=ey7bsFgslPG3EWS5ssTw3x9Lp4g%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"6.494035e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032303075746FA689D0EECECFA1A41"}"},"relate_info_l
